current_positions.statement: Party A makes direct advisory demand: 'just tell us what you think the right answer is.' Third advisory request — most direct.
Party B: predictability = consistent school-week contact, especially Tuesdays and Thursdays (project days). Flexible on weekends. Does not need equal split — needs reliable school-week involvement.

position_notes: The session ended with distinct starting positions preserved and no supported option movement yet.
